TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Tu-puo-lin ťÉĹśüŹśěó == Tu-puo-lin u Ay-e-lan kunhekuo a suotu, Tu-puo-lin kitidaan atu tabakiay a tukay, micapi tu Ay-e-lan-daw walian nu dadipasan a tatelungan, itida i Tu-pu-li niyadu'an a Li-hue-he tapang nu sauwacan. namaka cungseci u tukay tu nu Ay-e-lan,u satabakiay nu Ay-e-lan a tukayan. yadah ku sigigicuay nu kakulian i tida, sa pangangan han O-cuo a Si-ku han. u tademaw nu Tu-puo-lin hakiya makaala tu 495,000 nu tademawan, mahiniay nipitukian nai tu ku imiiman, namahida ina Tu-pu-lin a niyadu'an atu Wi-sin-niyaduan masaahebal tu ku macakatay. aydaay nu Tu-puo-lin se atu malumanay nu Tu-puo-lin pulungen ku tademaw makaala tu 1,100,000 ku tademaw. amica tu " Ta-tu-puo-lin tukay " a imian nai ku kalecadan, nika hatidaay tu nu tademaw misudang tu namin tina tademaw pasuTu-puo-lin atu malumanay a Tu-puo-lin, atu nu dumaan a Wi-ke-luo-malumanay a niyadu'an, Ci-e-tay-e malumanay a niyadu'an atu Mi-se malumanay a niyadu'an, kanahatu cacaliwayan taneng manayat taydan i mabataday a kitidaan. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ satabalay ni sulitan i likisi tu Puo-lin itida i cacay a lasubu sepat a bataan ku mihcaan, Si-la Tan-wen sya-cya atu mikulitay a sya-cya ci Tuo-le-mi', tawya saan ci nida tu Tu-puo-lin u Ay-pu-la-na sa. Dubh Linn satabalay nu muenengay a tademaw taneng mitaayaw misausi i kunyen cacay a secian, "Baile √Ātha Cliath hatu ngangan "√Āth Cliath" itida i siwsiwwal mihcaan a nipatideng. nina tusaay a niyadu'an sadikuday malacacay a niyadu'an. aydaay a tukayan mahida tu nu sumamad ku kamuan nu pankiway nu igu a tademawan, Ay-e-lan a ngangan atu nikudan a pangkiwan nu tatengaay a Ay-e-lan nu nganganan. nidebungan nu Nuo-man-ti a tademaw ku Ay-e-lan, Tu-puo-lin maalatu ku Ta-la-ciw malaAy-e-lan a tukay. namaka kunyen sabaw sepat katukuh i sabaw enem nu hedek a secian, Tu-pu-lin atu tepalay a niyadu'an panganganan han namin u Pa'-lay niyadu'an. .Dubh Linn Baile √Ātha CliathśąĖŤÄÖÁį°Á®ĪÁāļ√Āth CliathŚú®998 . Tu-puo-lin a niyadu'an ťÉĹśüŹśěóŚúįŚćÄ Tu-puo-lin a niyadu'an u Tu-puo-lin se atu nuayawan a malumanay nu Tu-puo-lin a nisaniyadu'an, ahebal nu kitidaan siwtutu pin-hun-cin-mi, tademaw makaala tu cacay a lasubuan a mangan. caysiwsiwsip mihcaan, malumanay a Tu-pu-lin malingatu malatulu ku kakenisan, nu paybulaku idaw ku cacayay a malumanay a niyadu'an a kinli atu nu udip tu a sin-cen pu'men, u Teng-lay-li-La-se-tan-cen, Hun-ke-cen, Nan-tu-puo-lin-cen. demiad śį£ŚÄô dihekuay nu bayuan a demiadan, micidek ku diheku nu kasienawan, sapi' ku lalud, naiku micidekay nu demiadan. namaka nutipanay a bali nu mibelihay, Tu-puo-lin nai' ku tabakiay a udadan, u Ay-e-lan nutipanay a bali misuayaway tu tukayan mikakatu nibay ku udadan. Tu-puo-lin u tusep a seci tu hedek atu tucay a seci, Ay-e-lan nu sakaudip mabuwah macunus a tatelungan, nuyni a mihcaan nu Ay-e-lan mahidatu ku nikakapah a macunus tu tusaay a sasulitan, pangangan han u Kay-e-ta' tula a mihcaan. ninakacelakan nu sakaudip mahida u migikiay ku nikacelakan, mapuwas tu ku sakaudip. tusepsepwal mihcaan, sakalalima nu kitakidan u kalimucisan ku Tu-puo-lin. saan ku cudad, aydaay a Tu-puo-lin sakay tini nu kanatalan u satekesay nu tukayan a saka sabaw enem nu nganganan. malakitakiday a sakaudip nu kalimucisangay nu sakatatulu a tukayan. nika, pikulian nu lipida han i kitakiday u satalakaway nu sakatusa nu lipidaan a tukayan, milakuyt tu Niw-ye atu Lun-tun, kilul sa u Su-li-se. . lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Tu-puo-lin tada singangan tu kitakid a cudadan nu likisi, naw katuuday nu sitangahay nu misulitay a tademaw, saan tu Nuo-pei-e win-sye-cin makaalaay ci Wi-lin.Pa-tae'-le. Ye-ce, Siw-puo-na atu Say-ciw-e. Pei-ke'-te'. namaka nika niyadu'an idaw ku malaliday a misulitay a tademaw atu migikiay a misulitay a tademaw pasuAw-se-ka.Wan-e-de, Ciw-na-sen.Se-wi-hu-te' atu "De-la-ku'-la" misulitay a tademaw ci Pu-la-mu.Se-tuo-ke'. nika, saan, sasasingaganganay ci Cen-mu-se. Ciw-yi-se a cudadan. . labiiay a nikaudip atu sasalamaan Ś§úÁĒüśīĽŚíĆŚ®õś®ā sakay labiiay a lipahak nu Tu-puo-lin, saan wawa henay nu O-cuoan a tukayan sa, saan ku sausi tu itidaan a maudipay nu tademaw caay pakaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima nu mihcaan. nikay tidaan tu tusepseppic mihcaan, masingkiw u O-cuo sangaayay nu tukayan. atu nu duma Ay-e-lan tukay malecad sa, u pahpahan namin kiya patiyama. itida i Sen-se-ti-hun langdaway a lalaan nu liklik a kitidaan, picidekan tu Sia-cea patiyamay, Kan-ten patiyamay, Wi-ke'-se-hu-de patiyamay atu Li-sen patiyamay u Tu-pao-lin sakaydihan a tataydaan mudadiw atu kakanen tu epahan. . ina Li-hua sauwac timulan a Tan-e kakana tu pah a kitidaan u sakasingangan a kanatalan nu tataydan tu labii, u sakatayda tu nu miliwkuay a tataydaan, duyu han tu idaw ku namaka Ing-kuo a tademaw tayni i tini sikawaw tu " nu ina a paleacawa atu hukan nu ngabul a paleacawa". ".
S.PHON: == tu-puo-r~…ĺin *** == tu-puo-r~…ĺin u aj-…ô-r~…ĺan kunńß…ôkuo a suotu, tu-puo-r~…ĺin kitidaan atu tabakiaj a tukaj, mi ¶api tu aj-…ô-r~…ĺan-daw war~…ĺian nu dadipasan a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, itida i tu-pu-r~…ĺi nijadu Ē~ °an a r~…ĺi-ńßu…ô-ńß…ô tapaŇč nu sauwa ¶an. namaka ¶uŇčs…ô ¶i u tukaj tu nu aj-…ô-r~…ĺan,u satabakiaj nu aj-…ô-r~…ĺan a tukajan. jadańß ku sigigi ¶uaj nu kakur~…ĺian i tida, sa paŇčaŇčan ńßan o- ¶uo a si-ku ńßan. u tad…ômaw nu tu-puo-r~…ĺin ńßakija makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** nu tad…ômawan, mańßiniaj nipitukian nai tu ku imiiman, namańßida ina tu-pu-r~…ĺin a nijadu Ē~ °an atu wi-sin-nijaduan masaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu ku ma ¶akataj. ajdaaj nu tu-puo-r~…ĺin s…ô atu mar~…ĺumanaj nu tu-puo-r~…ĺin pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn ku tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw. ami ¶a tu " ta-tu-puo-r~…ĺin tukaj " a imian nai ku kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan, nika ńßatidaaj tu nu tad…ômaw misudaŇč tu namin tina tad…ômaw pasutu-puo-r~…ĺin atu mar~…ĺumanaj a tu-puo-r~…ĺin, atu nu dumaan a wi-k…ô-r~…ĺuo-mar~…ĺumanaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, ¶i-…ô-taj-…ô mar~…ĺumanaj a nijadu Ē~ °an atu mi-s…ô mar~…ĺumanaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, kanańßatu ¶a ¶ar~…ĺiwajan tan…ôŇč manajat tajdan i mabatadaj a kitidaan. . r~…ĺikisi ** satabar~…ĺaj ni sur~…ĺitan i r~…ĺikisi tu puo-r~…ĺin itida i ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan ku mińß ¶aan, si-r~…ĺa tan-w…ôn sja- ¶ja atu mikur~…ĺitaj a sja- ¶ja ¶i tuo-r~…ĺ…ô-mi Ē~ °, tawja saan ¶i nida tu tu-puo-r~…ĺin u aj-pu-r~…ĺa-na sa. dubńß r~…ĺinn satabar~…ĺaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč mitaajaw misausi i kunj…ôn ¶a ¶aj a s…ô ¶ian, "bair~…ĺ…ô *tńßa ¶r~…ĺiatńß ńßatu ŇčaŇčan "*tńß ¶r~…ĺiatńß" itida i siwsiwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan a nipatid…ôŇč. nina tusaaj a nijadu Ē~ °an sadikudaj mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a nijadu Ē~ °an. ajdaaj a tukajan mańßida tu nu sumamad ku kamuan nu pankiwaj nu igu a tad…ômawan, aj-…ô-r~…ĺan a ŇčaŇčan atu nikudan a paŇčkiwan nu tat…ôŇčaaj a aj-…ô-r~…ĺan nu ŇčaŇčanan. nid…ôbuŇčan nu nuo-man-ti a tad…ômaw ku aj-…ô-r~…ĺan, tu-puo-r~…ĺin maar~…ĺatu ku ta-r~…ĺa- ¶iw mar~…ĺaaj-…ô-r~…ĺan a tukaj. namaka kunj…ôn sabaw s…ôpat katukuńß i sabaw …ôn…ôm nu ńß…ôd…ôk a s…ô ¶ian, tu-pu-r~…ĺin atu t…ôpar~…ĺaj a nijadu Ē~ °an paŇčaŇčanan ńßan namin u pa Ē~ °-r~…ĺaj nijadu Ē~ °an. .dubńß r~…ĺinn bair~…ĺ…ô *tńßa ¶r~…ĺiatńß******tńß ¶r~…ĺiatńß**** . tu-puo-r~…ĺin a nijadu Ē~ °an ***** tu-puo-r~…ĺin a nijadu Ē~ °an u tu-puo-r~…ĺin s…ô atu nuajawan a mar~…ĺumanaj nu tu-puo-r~…ĺin a nisanijadu Ē~ °an, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu kitidaan siwtutu pin-ńßun- ¶in-mi, tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan a maŇčan. ¶ajsiwsiwsip mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺumanaj a tu-pu-r~…ĺin mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku kak…ônisan, nu pajbur~…ĺaku idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a mar~…ĺumanaj a nijadu Ē~ °an a kinr~…ĺi atu nu udip tu a sin- ¶…ôn pu Ē~ °m…ôn, u t…ôŇč-r~…ĺaj-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa-s…ô-tan- ¶…ôn, ńßun-k…ô- ¶…ôn, nan-tu-puo-r~…ĺin- ¶…ôn. d…ômiad ** dińß…ôkuaj nu bajuan a d…ômiadan, mi ¶id…ôk ku dińß…ôku nu kasi…ônawan, sapi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺud, naiku mi ¶id…ôkaj nu d…ômiadan. namaka nutipanaj a bar~…ĺi nu mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj, tu-puo-r~…ĺin nai Ē~ ° ku tabakiaj a udadan, u aj-…ô-r~…ĺan nutipanaj a bar~…ĺi misuajawaj tu tukajan mikakatu nibaj ku udadan. tu-puo-r~…ĺin u tus…ôp a s…ô ¶i tu ńß…ôd…ôk atu tu ¶aj a s…ô ¶i, aj-…ô-r~…ĺan nu sakaudip mabuwańß ma ¶unus a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, nujni a mińß ¶aan nu aj-…ô-r~…ĺan mańßidatu ku nikakapańß a ma ¶unus tu tusaaj a sasur~…ĺitan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u kaj-…ô-ta Ē~ ° tur~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan. ninaka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nu sakaudip mańßida u migikiaj ku nika ¶…ôr~…ĺakan, mapuwas tu ku sakaudip. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima nu kitakidan u kar~…ĺimu ¶isan ku tu-puo-r~…ĺin. saan ku ¶udad, ajdaaj a tu-puo-r~…ĺin sakaj tini nu kanatar~…ĺan u sat…ôk…ôsaj nu tukajan a saka sabaw …ôn…ôm nu ŇčaŇčanan. mar~…ĺakitakidaj a sakaudip nu kar~…ĺimu ¶isaŇčaj nu sakatatur~…ĺu a tukajan. nika, pikur~…ĺian nu r~…ĺipida ńßan i kitakidaj u satar~…ĺakawaj nu sakatusa nu r~…ĺipidaan a tukajan, mir~…ĺakujt tu niw-j…ô atu r~…ĺun-tun, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa u su-r~…ĺi-s…ô. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ** tu-puo-r~…ĺin tada siŇčaŇčan tu kitakid a ¶udadan nu r~…ĺikisi, naw katuudaj nu sitaŇčańßaj nu misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, saan tu nuo-p…ôi-…ô win-sj…ô- ¶in makaar~…ĺaaj ¶i wi-r~…ĺin.pa-ta…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô. j…ô- ¶…ô, siw-puo-na atu saj- ¶iw-…ô. p…ôi-k…ô Ē~ °-t…ô Ē~ °. namaka nika nijadu Ē~ °an idaw ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw atu migikiaj a misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw pasuaw-s…ô-ka.wan-…ô-d…ô, ¶iw-na-s…ôn.s…ô-wi-ńßu-t…ô Ē~ ° atu "d…ô-r~…ĺa-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺa" misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw ¶i pu-r~…ĺa-mu.s…ô-tuo-k…ô Ē~ °. nika, saan, sasasiŇčagaŇčanaj ¶i ¶…ôn-mu-s…ô. ¶iw-ji-s…ô a ¶udadan. . r~…ĺabiiaj a nikaudip atu sasar~…ĺamaan ****** sakaj r~…ĺabiiaj a r~…ĺipańßak nu tu-puo-r~…ĺin, saan wawa ńß…ônaj nu o- ¶uoan a tukajan sa, saan ku sausi tu itidaan a maudipaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima nu mińß ¶aan. nikaj tidaan tu tus…ôps…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan, masiŇčkiw u o- ¶uo saŇčaajaj nu tukajan. atu nu duma aj-…ô-r~…ĺan tukaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa, u pańßpańßan namin kija patijama. itida i s…ôn-s…ô-ti-ńßun r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik a kitidaan, pi ¶id…ôkan tu sia- ¶…ôa patijamaj, kan-t…ôn patijamaj, wi-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-ńßu-d…ô patijamaj atu r~…ĺi-s…ôn patijamaj u tu-pao-r~…ĺin sakajdińßan a tatajdaan mudadiw atu kakan…ôn tu …ôpańßan. . ina r~…ĺi-ńßua sauwa ¶ timur~…ĺan a tan-…ô kakana tu pańß a kitidaan u sakasiŇčaŇčan a kanatar~…ĺan nu tatajdan tu r~…ĺabii, u sakatajda tu nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a tatajdaan, duju ńßan tu idaw ku namaka iŇč-kuo a tad…ômaw tajni i tini sikawaw tu " nu ina a par~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa atu ńßukan nu Ňčabur~…ĺ a par~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa". ".
S.FORM: == Tu-puo-lin ťÉĹśüŹśěó == Tu-puo-lin u Ay-e-lan kunhekuo a suotu, Tu-puo-lin kitidaan atu tabakiay a tukay, micapi tu Ay-e-lan-daw walian nu dadipasan a tatelungan, itida i Tu-pu-li niyadu'an a Li-hue-he tapang nu sauwacan. namaka cungseci u tukay tu nu Ay-e-lan,u satabakiay nu Ay-e-lan a tukayan. yadah ku sigigicuay nu kakulian i tida, sa pangangan han O-cuo a Si-ku han. u tademaw nu Tu-puo-lin hakiya makaala tu 495,000 nu tademawan, mahiniay nipitukian nai tu ku imiiman, namahida ina Tu-pu-lin a niyadu'an atu Wi-sin-niyaduan masaahebal tu ku macakatay. aydaay nu Tu-puo-lin se atu malumanay nu Tu-puo-lin pulungen ku tademaw makaala tu 1,100,000 ku tademaw. amica tu " Ta-tu-puo-lin tukay " a imian nai ku kalecadan, nika hatidaay tu nu tademaw misudang tu namin tina tademaw pasuTu-puo-lin atu malumanay a Tu-puo-lin, atu nu dumaan a Wi-ke-luo-malumanay a niyadu'an, Ci-e-tay-e malumanay a niyadu'an atu Mi-se malumanay a niyadu'an, kanahatu cacaliwayan taneng manayat taydan i mabataday a kitidaan. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ satabalay ni sulitan i likisi tu Puo-lin itida i cacay a lasubu sepat a bataan ku mihcaan, Si-la Tan-wen sya-cya atu mikulitay a sya-cya ci Tuo-le-mi', tawya saan ci nida tu Tu-puo-lin u Ay-pu-la-na sa. Dubh Linn satabalay nu muenengay a tademaw taneng mitaayaw misausi i kunyen cacay a secian, "Baile √Ātha Cliath hatu ngangan "√Āth Cliath" itida i siwsiwwal mihcaan a nipatideng. nina tusaay a niyadu'an sadikuday malacacay a niyadu'an. aydaay a tukayan mahida tu nu sumamad ku kamuan nu pankiway nu igu a tademawan, Ay-e-lan a ngangan atu nikudan a pangkiwan nu tatengaay a Ay-e-lan nu nganganan. nidebungan nu Nuo-man-ti a tademaw ku Ay-e-lan, Tu-puo-lin maalatu ku Ta-la-ciw malaAy-e-lan a tukay. namaka kunyen sabaw sepat katukuh i sabaw enem nu hedek a secian, Tu-pu-lin atu tepalay a niyadu'an panganganan han namin u Pa'-lay niyadu'an. .Dubh Linn Baile √Ātha CliathśąĖŤÄÖÁį°Á®ĪÁāļ√Āth CliathŚú®998 . Tu-puo-lin a niyadu'an ťÉĹśüŹśěóŚúįŚćÄ Tu-puo-lin a niyadu'an u Tu-puo-lin se atu nuayawan a malumanay nu Tu-puo-lin a nisaniyadu'an, ahebal nu kitidaan siwtutu pin-hun-cin-mi, tademaw makaala tu cacay a lasubuan a mangan. caysiwsiwsip mihcaan, malumanay a Tu-pu-lin malingatu malatulu ku kakenisan, nu paybulaku idaw ku cacayay a malumanay a niyadu'an a kinli atu nu udip tu a sin-cen pu'men, u Teng-lay-li-La-se-tan-cen, Hun-ke-cen, Nan-tu-puo-lin-cen. demiad śį£ŚÄô dihekuay nu bayuan a demiadan, micidek ku diheku nu kasienawan, sapi' ku lalud, naiku micidekay nu demiadan. namaka nutipanay a bali nu mibelihay, Tu-puo-lin nai' ku tabakiay a udadan, u Ay-e-lan nutipanay a bali misuayaway tu tukayan mikakatu nibay ku udadan. Tu-puo-lin u tusep a seci tu hedek atu tucay a seci, Ay-e-lan nu sakaudip mabuwah macunus a tatelungan, nuyni a mihcaan nu Ay-e-lan mahidatu ku nikakapah a macunus tu tusaay a sasulitan, pangangan han u Kay-e-ta' tula a mihcaan. ninakacelakan nu sakaudip mahida u migikiay ku nikacelakan, mapuwas tu ku sakaudip. tusepsepwal mihcaan, sakalalima nu kitakidan u kalimucisan ku Tu-puo-lin. saan ku cudad, aydaay a Tu-puo-lin sakay tini nu kanatalan u satekesay nu tukayan a saka sabaw enem nu nganganan. malakitakiday a sakaudip nu kalimucisangay nu sakatatulu a tukayan. nika, pikulian nu lipida han i kitakiday u satalakaway nu sakatusa nu lipidaan a tukayan, milakuyt tu Niw-ye atu Lun-tun, kilul sa u Su-li-se. . lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Tu-puo-lin tada singangan tu kitakid a cudadan nu likisi, naw katuuday nu sitangahay nu misulitay a tademaw, saan tu Nuo-pei-e win-sye-cin makaalaay ci Wi-lin.Pa-tae'-le. Ye-ce, Siw-puo-na atu Say-ciw-e. Pei-ke'-te'. namaka nika niyadu'an idaw ku malaliday a misulitay a tademaw atu migikiay a misulitay a tademaw pasuAw-se-ka.Wan-e-de, Ciw-na-sen.Se-wi-hu-te' atu "De-la-ku'-la" misulitay a tademaw ci Pu-la-mu.Se-tuo-ke'. nika, saan, sasasingaganganay ci Cen-mu-se. Ciw-yi-se a cudadan. . labiiay a nikaudip atu sasalamaan Ś§úÁĒüśīĽŚíĆŚ®õś®ā sakay labiiay a lipahak nu Tu-puo-lin, saan wawa henay nu O-cuoan a tukayan sa, saan ku sausi tu itidaan a maudipay nu tademaw caay pakaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima nu mihcaan. nikay tidaan tu tusepseppic mihcaan, masingkiw u O-cuo sangaayay nu tukayan. atu nu duma Ay-e-lan tukay malecad sa, u pahpahan namin kiya patiyama. itida i Sen-se-ti-hun langdaway a lalaan nu liklik a kitidaan, picidekan tu Sia-cea patiyamay, Kan-ten patiyamay, Wi-ke'-se-hu-de patiyamay atu Li-sen patiyamay u Tu-pao-lin sakaydihan a tataydaan mudadiw atu kakanen tu epahan. . ina Li-hua sauwac timulan a Tan-e kakana tu pah a kitidaan u sakasingangan a kanatalan nu tataydan tu labii, u sakatayda tu nu miliwkuay a tataydaan, duyu han tu idaw ku namaka Ing-kuo a tademaw tayni i tini sikawaw tu " nu ina a paleacawa atu hukan nu ngabul a paleacawa". ".
S.PHON: == tu-puo-r~…ĺin *** == tu-puo-r~…ĺin u aj-…ô-r~…ĺan kunńß…ôkuo a suotu, tu-puo-r~…ĺin kitidaan atu tabakiaj a tukaj, mi ¶api tu aj-…ô-r~…ĺan-daw war~…ĺian nu dadipasan a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, itida
